title: The Mysterious Neighbor
content: A new neighbor moved into the house across the street but rarely spoke to anyone. Every morning, he left early carrying a large black bag and returned after sunset. The children in the neighborhood invented many exciting stories about him. One afternoon, they finally met him at the local park. He smiled and explained that he was a wildlife photographer. The mysterious bag was full of cameras and lenses. Everyone laughed at their imagination and enjoyed looking at his beautiful animal photographs.
